Turn #1.message: You should've just said so from the start!

message: Oohhh, I don't like it here...
Creepy monsters lurk around every corner,

Turn #1.message: and I can't find the way out...

message: Anyway. How did you get here?
Or rather, how does one exit?

Turn #1.message: Bartz: Oh, just go that way, then...
Gilgamesh: I see! Let us egress posthaste!
Gilgamesh: Have at thee, vile beast!

message: Say...afterwards, what say we have a few
spectacular adventures, just us five?
Gilgamesh: ...Oh yes, that whole
saving the world thing....phooey.

actions.message: If you make it out safely...

message: Hah! No ifs about it.
I'm certain we'll meet again.

actions.message: At that time, I hope you'll consider me a...

Turn #1.message: It'd rock if I could roll along with you!

global_events: Golem + Bone Dragon + Zombie Dragon defeated

Turn #1.message: and are copying that nothing yourselves!
Yes! You feel itーthe essence of mimicry!

message: I give you my blessing
to continue on the true path of imitation!

Turn #1.message: The basisーno, the very soul of mimicry
is the ability to aptly imitate anything,
Thusly, I will imitate your every move!
When you attack, I will attack.
When you cast a spell, I'll cast a spell.
Could you imitate me, you'd certainly win.
More likely, it will be curtains for you!

actions.message: Know you nothing of an artist's soul?
Cut! Cut! Stop TRYING to mimic!
